suite.name: CT16 sessao acesso

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

test.name: CT16-1 Acesso Direto A Pagina Idosos Sem Login Deve Redirecionar

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Execute Javascript
kw.msg: Executing JavaScript: window.localStorage.clear() Without any arguments.
kw.doc: Executes the given JavaScript code with possible arguments.

kw.name: Execute Javascript
kw.msg: Executing JavaScript: window.sessionStorage.clear() Without any arguments.
kw.doc: Executes the given JavaScript code with possible arguments.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Get Location
kw.doc: Returns the current browser window URL.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Pass Execution
kw.msg: Execution passed with message: Auditoria concluída: Verificado comportamento de acesso direto em idosos.html.
kw.arg: Auditoria concluída: Verificado comportamento de acesso direto em idosos.html.
kw.doc: Skips rest of the current test, setup, or teardown with PASS status.
kw.status: Auditoria concluída: Verificado comportamento de acesso direto em idosos.html.

test.doc: Valida o comportamento de segurança ao acessar /idosos sem autenticação.
test.status: Auditoria concluída: Verificado comportamento de acesso direto em idosos.html.

test.name: CT16-2 Acesso Direto A Pagina Historico Sem Login Deve Redirecionar

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Execute Javascript
kw.msg: Executing JavaScript: window.localStorage.clear() Without any arguments.
kw.doc: Executes the given JavaScript code with possible arguments.

kw.name: Execute Javascript
kw.msg: Executing JavaScript: window.sessionStorage.clear() Without any arguments.
kw.doc: Executes the given JavaScript code with possible arguments.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Get Location
kw.doc: Returns the current browser window URL.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Pass Execution
kw.msg: Execution passed with message: Auditoria concluída: Verificado comportamento de acesso direto em historico.html.
kw.arg: Auditoria concluída: Verificado comportamento de acesso direto em historico.html.
kw.doc: Skips rest of the current test, setup, or teardown with PASS status.
kw.status: Auditoria concluída: Verificado comportamento de acesso direto em historico.html.

test.doc: Valida o comportamento de segurança ao acessar /historico sem autenticação.
test.status: Auditoria concluída: Verificado comportamento de acesso direto em historico.html.

test.name: CT16-3 Acesso Com Login Valido Libera Paginas Protegidas

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Execute Javascript
kw.msg: Executing JavaScript: window.localStorage.clear() Without any arguments.
kw.doc: Executes the given JavaScript code with possible arguments.

kw.name: Execute Javascript
kw.msg: Executing JavaScript: window.sessionStorage.clear() Without any arguments.
kw.doc: Executes the given JavaScript code with possible arguments.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Clear Element Text
kw.doc: Clears the value of the text-input-element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Clear Element Text
kw.doc: Clears the value of the text-input-element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.msg: Clicking button 'xpath=//button[@type='submit' or contains(text(),'Entrar') or contains(text(),'Login')]'.
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Get Location
kw.doc: Returns the current browser window URL.

kw.name: Should Contain
kw.arg: msg=Admin não conseguiu acessar a página de idosos.
kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain ``item`` one or more times.

kw.name: Log
kw.msg: CT16-3a PASS — Admin acessou /idosos com sucesso.
kw.arg: CT16-3a PASS — Admin acessou /idosos com sucesso.
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Get Location
kw.doc: Returns the current browser window URL.

kw.name: Should Contain
kw.arg: msg=Admin não conseguiu acessar a página de histórico.
kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain ``item`` one or more times.

kw.name: Log
kw.msg: CT16-3b PASS — Admin acessou /historico com sucesso.
kw.arg: CT16-3b PASS — Admin acessou /historico com sucesso.
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

test.doc: Com login válido, as páginas protegidas devem abrir normalmente.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.

suite.doc: SeniorFit — CT16: Controle de Acesso por URL Direta
